name: Ziti Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Ziti noodles according to package instructions.
2. Brown the ground beef over medium heat until fully cooked.
3. Remove the beef from heat and stir in the ricotta cheese, egg, salt, pepper, and parsley.
4. Add 1/2 of the spaghetti sauce and mix well.
5. Add the prepared Ziti noodles and toss to ensure they are evenly covered with the mixture.
6. Transfer the contents to a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
7. Spread the remaining spaghetti sauce over the top of the mixture.
8. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese evenly on top.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
